title: Stinky SMP
description: A modpack for a public and active 1.20.1 Origins server!
body:
This is the modpack for the active and public Origins server known as Stinky SMP! See the Planet Minecraft page for more details:
- [https://www.planetminecraft.com/server/stinky-smp/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/server/stinky-smp/)

![Poster for Stinky SMP](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/server/2024/811/17494049-postertop_l.webp)

Hello, Modrinth! Check out Stinky SMP! This is a 1.20.1 and updating server, with an emphasis on fair moderation (appeals, and punishment only for true rulebreaks), extreme longevity (absolutely NO resets since May 2022!) and welcoming inclusivity of all people and playstyles. Be you a nomad, builder, PVPer, trader or anything, you'll find a place here. Any reason you can't? Make a suggestion, we'll look at it!

## **GREAT PERFORMANCE!**
Our vanilla+ modpack with many performance optimisers ensures minimal client-side lag. Server-side, we have 16 gigs of ram + a Ryzen 9 7950X CPU, the best CPU for servers that money can buy.

## **WANT BLOODSHED? WANT PEACE AND LOVE? HAVE BOTH!**
The server operates on a Safezone-Borderlands system, where a continuously expanding 4k-radius area centred on spawn has claims, graves and disallows (unless with consent) griefing, killing and stealing. The Borderlands is much more resource-rich but allows griefing, killing and stealing and has no claims or graves.

## **THE ORIGINS MOD!**
We have a very special mod, the [Origins mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)! Along with the 9 base origins, we have roughly 62 custom origins, all carefully reviewed so that we can make sure each one is balanced, unique and well designed! You can even suggest custom origins, but it'll have to be high quality. Of course, if you don't like this mod, or don't like your current origin, you can always pick Human or use your free two changes/craft an origin change.

![Advertisement banner for Stinky SMP](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/banner/889428_12.png)

**This is our Discord server invite! Please join for more information:** [https://discord.gg/qjzu6sWXjw](https://discord.gg/qjzu6sWXjw)


<details>
<summary>More about this modpack...</summary>

## About the listed versions:
The official version of this modpack is curated by [@AphoticGoblin](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/aphoticgoblin/), the owner of Stinky SMP.

This page on Modrinth includes both an officially curated modpack port to Modrinth (the distributed version from the Stinky SMP [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qjzu6sWXjw)), as well as an unofficially curated version of the modpack by myself, [@chez_berger](https://modrinth.com/user/chez_berger).

This unofficial version is a modified version of the official modpack. I have not added any mods that are blacklisted from the server, nor have I removed any mods that are required to play on the server. If you have any questions about this Modrinth page or the unofficial version, please contact me on Discord. (My username is [@chez_berger](https://discordapp.com/users/656367761676566540), DMs open!).

## Notable modpack alterations:
(All major alterations will be listed alongside which bullet point of the official whitelist they fall under. The whitelist can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1VnHwSZWSiqWZggmmgSQlGzO9pUFa4WK72X--vdRYc3w/edit).)

- [Global Datapacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/datapacks/version/1.2) for built-in singleplayer support for all origin datapacks as of May 28, 2024 (Whitelisted under #7)
- Replaced [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting/version/1.9.0-1.20) with [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next/version/fabric-1.20.1-1.10.10) due to issues with the former (Whitelisted under #16)
- [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost/version/1.20-fabric0.83.0-1.1.5) for issues with ghost blocks in claimed areas (Whitelisted under #16)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls/version/3.2.0-1.20.1-fabric), [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping/version/mc1.20.4-v1.0.1), [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium/version/2.0.3+mc1.20-1.20.1), and [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit/version/3.0.0+1.20+) for more responsive UX for resource pack installation, server pinging, generating singleplayer worlds, and exiting singleplayer worlds respectively. (Whitelisted under #7)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling/version/12.0.2) for better keybind UX (Whitelisted under #7)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations/version/1.7.3) for more expressive player animations (Whitelisted under #1)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options/version/mc1.20.1-1.7.2) and [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/version/mc1.20.1-0.5.4) for some smaller performance tweaks (Whitelisted under #2)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/2.3.2+1.20.1) (Whitelisted under #16)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads/version/0.12.2) and [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation/version/1.0.5) for a livelier chat UI (Whitelisted under #1)
- [MacOS Input Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/macos-input-fixes/version/1.6) and [Ctrl Q](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctrl-q/version/1.9-f1.19.3+) for better Mac UX (Whitelisted under #7)
- [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen/version/1.6.14) because it looks sexy, modified to have a green loading bar as well! (Whitelisted under #1)
- [Shoulder Surfing](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded/version/1.20.1-3.2.0) (Whitelisted under #16)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/version/1.7.0+1.20.1) (Whitelisted under #1)
- [Chunks Fade In](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in/version/v1.0.5-1.20.1) (Whitelisted under #1)
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining/version/1.1.8+1.20.1) (Whitelisted under #1)
- [Shulker Box Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip/version/4.0.4+1.20.1-fabric) (Whitelisted under #5)
- [Emoji Type](https://modrinth.com/mod/emoji-type/version/2.2.3+1.20.4) (Whitelisted under #7)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3/version/7.0.2) (Whitelisted under #8)
- [FabriShot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot/version/1.10.1) (Whitelisted under #1)
- A few minor bugfixing mods: [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/version/5.17.0+mc1.20.1), [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix/version/v1.1.5), and [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/version/1.15) (Whitelisted under #2)
- Several minor visual mods: [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes/version/0.2.4+1.20.1), [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation/version/1.9.61), [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust/version/1.4.1), [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain/version/v2.0.8), [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality/version/0.7.1+1.20), [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves/version/1.15.6+1.20.1), [Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric/version/1.19-0.3.2), and [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping/version/0.9.3.1-1.20.2) (Whitelisted under #1)
- And last but not least, [Alternate Origin UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/altorigingui/version/v1.0.1+1.20.1) (Whitelisted under #16)

Many of these mods do fall under multiple whitelist criteria bullets, but I have only listed one each for the sake of brevity.

</details>
